subject: Urgent: System Down
body: Hi, our production system is down. Please investigate immediately.

subject: Invoice #4521
body: Please find attached invoice #4521 for your recent order.

subject: Holiday Schedule 2025
body: Please review the attached holiday schedule for 2025.

subject: Question about pricing
body: Hello, we are interested in your enterprise plan. Can you share pricing details?

subject: Weekly Tech Digest
body: This week in tech: AI advances, cloud updates, and more.

subject: URGENT: Login Issues
body: Multiple users are unable to log in to the platform. This is urgent.

subject: Partnership Proposal
body: We would like to propose a co-marketing partnership for Q2.

subject: Q4 Budget Review Meeting
body: Please join the Q4 budget review meeting on Friday at 3pm.

subject: Invoice Request
body: Could you send us the invoice for our last subscription renewal?

subject: Urgent Security Patch Required
body: A critical vulnerability has been identified. Please apply the patch immediately.

subject: Job Application: Software Engineer
body: I am writing to apply for the Software Engineer position posted on your website.

subject: Feature Request: Dark Mode
body: We would love to see a dark mode option in the next release.

subject: You Won a Prize!!!
body: Click here to claim your million dollar prize!

subject: Question About API Rate Limits
body: We are hitting rate limits on the API. What are the current thresholds?

subject: Scheduled Maintenance Window
body: Maintenance is scheduled for Saturday 2am-6am. Please ensure readiness.

subject: Urgent: Payment Failed
body: Our latest payment attempt failed. Can you check the billing system?

subject: Data Sharing Agreement
body: We are interested in a data sharing agreement for our research project.

subject: Question on Integration Options
body: What integration options do you support? We use Salesforce and Slack.

subject: Updated Privacy Policy
body: Please review the updated privacy policy effective March 1st.

subject: Feature Request: Export to PDF
body: It would be very helpful to have an export to PDF feature for reports.
